creator: mohacsi@niif.hu
text:
Dear Palle,
 
  	I wrote an e-mail to you a while ago, that I agree that 
 maintainership of shibolleth-sp and related tools should be put in one 
 hand. If you willing to take maintainence I am ready to let you do it 
 together with: opensaml, xmltooling and apache-xml-security-c.
 
 Best Regards,
 
 Janos Mohacsi
 Network Engineer, Director Network and Multimedia
 NIIF/HUNGARNET, HUNGARY
 Co-chair of Hungarian IPv6 Forum
 Key 70EF9882: DEC2 C685 1ED4 C95A 145F  4300 6F64 7B00 70EF 9882
